script: |
  Write-Host "Current directory:"
  Get-Location

  Write-Host ""
  Write-Host "Root contents:"
  Get-ChildItem -Path . -Force

  Write-Host ""
  Write-Host "src contents:"
  Get-ChildItem -Path .\src -Force

  Write-Host ""
  Write-Host "IntServices contents:"
  Get-ChildItem -Path .\src\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.IntServices -Force

  Write-Host ""
  Write-Host "AzureFunctions contents:"
  Get-ChildItem -Path .\src\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.IntServices\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.AzureFunctions -Force
